Security: Arbitrary file read within sandbox boundaries lacks content filtering

Proposal: Security Gateway Framework for Third-Party Skill Installation
Skill supply-chain security: provenance tracking + permission manifests
[Security] Agent executes instructions from untrusted file content despite explicit read-only directive (indirect prompt injection)
Security Roadmap: Protecting API Keys from Agent Access
[Feature Request] Unified Security Profile System with Preset Scenario Templates
[Security] Plugin Runtime: Lateral Movement via Shared Process Model
[Bug]: Security audit: allow suppressing acknowledged findings + fix false positives
feat(security): add client-side skill security enforcement
[Security][Feature]: Credential Firewall — domain-pinned secret injection where the LLM never sees credentials
Feature Proposal: Security Scan Hook API for skill:install
[Feature]: Add CI Checks to Enforce TLS Security Standards
[Bug]: Upgrade to 2026.2.17 does not auto-migrate plugins.allow when extensions exist (security audit critical)
[Feature]: Hook security enhancement: map Gmail preset payloads to tool-role context instead of user-role prompt text
Security: Indirect prompt injection via URL link preview metadata
SSH transport security check rejects connection before tunnel is established
security audit: two false positives for single-operator multi-agent setups
[Feature]: Allow sandbox for main but keep sandbox for groups without security warning
[Security/Architecture/Feature] Preventing Prompt Injection in Cron Jobs via Privilege Separation & Tagging
Security: unpaired message response leaks platform identity
[Bug]: Security audit falsely reports “UFW not found” when ufw is installed in /usr/sbin but sbin not in PATH
[Security] Sandbox containers have no default pidsLimit - vulnerable to fork bomb attacks
[Bug]: Security audit doesn't check top-level channels.discord.allowFrom for slash commands
[Security] Browser screenshot tool auto-delivers sensitive on-screen data to chat channels
[Security] web-fetch-visibility: near-invisible CSS patterns not covered by sanitizer
Security by Intent: Progressive Permission Pattern Generalization to Eliminate Privilege Escalation and Approval Fatigue
Security: Unauthorized OAuth credential extraction from Gemini CLI installation
Security: strengthen external content handling with persistent tainting, content-derived execution guardrails, and exec risk classes
Proposal: Add security warning for untrusted skills loaded from local sources
Proposal: Enhance security audit to include `skill.md` for better risk detection
[Feature]: Security: fetch-auth bearer token fallback attaches tokens to arbitrary URLs without fail-closed defaults
[Bug]: Security prompt is too long to approve, and clicking "Allow All" on the security prompt is ineffective
[Bug]: security audit "config.secrets.hooks_token_in_config" fires for ${VAR} env refs because the check runs on the resolved config
[Feature]: Tool security classification properties (isDestructive, isReadOnly, isConcurrencySafe)
[Bug]: tools.exec.security corrupted by plugin init logs — hot-reload concatenates plugin output into config value
[Security] High: MCP loopback scope spoofing via mutable request headers
[Feature][Security]: Add optional TOTP (authenticator app code) to exec approvals
webchat: system event completion messages visible to user and styled as user messages
[Bug]: Security Issue: Agent Privacy Isolation Bypass via Direct File Read
[Feature] Add denylist mode to exec.security for balanced security
Security: exec tool returns raw stdout/stderr to agent without secret redaction
[Feature]: Standard Interface for External Security and Guardrail Checks
Explore per-agent worker isolation, VFS scratch storage, and host filesystem capabilities
[Feature]: Local user sandbox backend for per-agent Unix account isolation
[Bug]: SYSTEM_RUN_DISABLED despite effective exec policy showing security=full
openclaw security audit --deep hangs during diagnostics on 2026.5.12
feat(anthropic): enforce --safe-mode on all claude-cli subprocess launches
[Bug]: tools.exec.security config not applied at runtime after gateway restart
feat(agents): per-agent env injection into spawned subprocesses
Feature request: Mimir as persistent memory backend
[Feature]: Forward run context to the model as opt-in request headers (cost attribution behind a proxy)
fix(ui): preserve WebChat wheel scroll intent
bug(acpx): Windows embedded ACPX runtime fails with spawn EINVAL for claude adapter — runtime=acp unusable on Windows
Feature request: Configurable HUD wake-word silence window (talk.wakeCaptureSilenceMs)
[Feature]: Telegram sendRichMessage support — tables, inline media, math formulas, 32k char limit
[Bug]: Slack media/generated-completion sends on internal-wake turns post to channel root on 2026.6.5 (incomplete fix of #92171)
[Bug]: Matrix error decrypting event
docs: fix docs metadata spellcheck
fix(device-pairing): guard role normalization against non-string entries
fix: support baseURL alias in memory embedding provider config resolution
[Feature]: Allow selecting cron job models and clearly displaying them in the Web UI
fix(auto-reply): suppress silent tokens with trailing punctuation or quotes
exec host=node denied by Companion App policy despite correct config
feat(ui): add model selector to cron quick-create wizard and job list
fix(exec): allow full-trust node exec when node approval policy is unavailable
fix(cron): emit before_agent_reply phase unconditionally for cron triggers
fix(daemon): strip leading backslash from schtasks name before managed-task comparison
fix(test-env): exclude browser cache subdirs when staging .gemini into temp home
fix(nodes): align node-host exec policy defaults with global security…
fix(acp): recover stale persistent sessions by structured resume-required code [AI-assisted]
Bug: openclaw-weixin startAccount ???,?????????? session
fix(gateway): reap stale MCP processes on session reset regardless of…
fix(cron): always emit before_agent_reply phase to clear pre-executio…
[Bug]: operator-approvals runtime connection used as transport for operator.write RPCs → silent 'missing scope: operator.write' (no write-capable client reselection)
fix(cron): normalize run-log jobId on write to match read-side validation
Configuring Weixin via channel setup installs plugin, then fails on plugins.allow instead of auto-allowlisting
fix(cron): always emit before_agent_reply phase for cron triggers to prevent watchdog false-positive
fix #86957: [Bug]: Telegram Ingress Routing Bug
fix(plugins): auto-allowlist any explicitly selected plugin, not just ClickClack (fixes #93568)
fix(exec): read legacy exec-approvals.json instead of deny fallback (#93518)
fix(agents): repair orphaned tool_use pairs on compaction prune path
fix(cron): clear pre-execution watchdog on any phase notification (#93530)
fix(plugins): extend allowlist bypass to all explicitly selected channel plugins
feat(onboard): show upfront ETA timeline during setup wizard (fixes #74399)
fix(plugins): activate dreaming engine sidecar under restrictive allowlist
fix(reply): clarify provider internal error copy
[Feature]: Can the streaming output increase the size of the configuration control block?
fix(tools): auto-correct hallucinated file extensions in tool call params (fixes #93326)
Verify installed ClawHub skill file hashes
fix(memory): align session file counter denominator with indexer filter
Integration: MCP provider for Claude Code subscription — local agent execution without API keys
[Bug]: opencode-go provider streaming — API calls complete on provider side but gateway never receives stream termination signal
feat(gateway): add configurable streaming chunk size for HTTP endpoints
fix(reply): preserve unsent text-only finals after block pipeline streamed partial content (fixes #81078)
fix(tool-error): suppress "⚠ failed" warning for Codex app-server exec_command
fix: 代码块复制按钮在 HTTP 环境下增加 execCommand 降级方案
fix: add execCommand fallback for code block copy over plain HTTP
fix(infra): guard all startup process.cwd() callers against deleted CWD [AI-assisted]
fix(#93381): Hook payloads omit tool_use blocks
fix(telegram): enhance crash recovery and stale lease detection for silent polling crashes
fix(message-tool): apply messages.responsePrefix to outbound sends
fix(acp): retry Kiro persistent session after Internal error resume failure (fixes #87830)
fix(approvals): reselect write-capable gateway client for operator.write RPCs
fix(agents): return string assistant content in getLastAssistantText
fix(process): default killProcessTree to direct-pid kill, opt-in group kill (fixes #76259)
fix(dreaming): increase narrative timeout from 60s to 120s for ARM cold-load (fixes #92494)
feat(inbound-meta): expose message_type in trusted inbound metadata (fixes #50482)
